paths.name: Visitor→Login→Projects→Owner/Admin Board→Activity Ready
paths.semanticGoal: Cover visitor entry to landing, login success, project list ready, owner/admin board load, and activity log ready path.

paths.name: Entry→Landing→Register→Register Rejected→Back to Landing
paths.semanticGoal: Cover register navigation from landing, registration rejection, and return to landing.

paths.name: Entry→Login→Landing→Register Success→Projects Empty→Create Project Rejected→Projects Error
paths.semanticGoal: Cover switching between login and landing, successful registration to projects, empty list create-project rejection, then projects load error.

paths.name: Login Success→Projects Error→Retry→Empty→Invitation Reject→Back
paths.semanticGoal: Cover project list failure and retry behavior, plus invitation rejection flow from empty project list.

paths.name: Login→Projects Ready→Member Board Error→Retry→Members Ready→Back to Board
paths.semanticGoal: Cover member board load failure and retry, then members inspection flow and return to member board.

paths.name: Visitor→Login→Viewer Board Empty→Back→Projects Empty→Logout
paths.semanticGoal: Cover viewer board empty-state navigation back to projects, then logout from empty project list to landing.

paths.name: Register→Projects Empty→Create Project Success→Owner/Admin Board Empty→Structure Success→WIP Reject
paths.semanticGoal: Cover project creation success into owner/admin board, structure management success from empty board, and WIP rule rejection handling.

paths.name: Owner/Admin Board→Task Detail→Task Edit Conflict→Status Rejected
paths.semanticGoal: Cover task detail editor load, task edit conflict refresh, and illegal status transition rejection refresh.

paths.name: Owner/Admin Board→Task Comment Success→Archive Task→Archived View Empty
paths.semanticGoal: Cover comment append success with refresh, then task archive success routing into archived view empty state.

paths.name: Member Board→Create Task WIP Blocked→Move Task Conflict→Back
paths.semanticGoal: Cover member create-task WIP rejection path and task-move conflict path, returning to board each time.

paths.name: Owner/Admin Members→Invite Rejected→Members Retry→Back to Board
paths.semanticGoal: Cover owner/admin members page, membership management invitation rejection, members load failure retry, and return to board.

paths.name: Owner/Admin Board→Settings→Archive Project Success→Archived View Ready
paths.semanticGoal: Cover owner-only settings navigation, project archive success, and archived view ready state load.

paths.name: Activity Log Error→Retry→Empty
paths.semanticGoal: Cover activity log failure and retry into empty state.

paths.name: Archived View Error→Retry→Ready
paths.semanticGoal: Cover archived view failure and retry into ready state.

paths.name: Projects→Viewer Board→Task Detail Fail→Retry→Close Back
paths.semanticGoal: Cover viewer board load, viewer task detail failure and retry, and closing panel back to board.

paths.name: Task Detail→Assignee Change Rejected→Task Detail Error Retry→Close to Member Board
paths.semanticGoal: Cover task assignment rejection with refresh, task detail load error retry recovery, then close panel to member board.
